title: feat: add p0 adapter execution boundary preview
goal: Add local/internal adapter execution boundary preview for approved reaction dispatch dry-run metadata without adapter execution.

risks.mitigation: Endpoint returns preview metadata only; tests assert no external execution and no dispatch count increment.
risks.risk: Preview accidentally executes adapter or downstream runtime work.

risks.mitigation: Preview re-checks current dry-run safety and blocks drift before returning an execution boundary preview.
risks.risk: Approved dry-run boundary is used after unsafe state drift.

risks.mitigation: Preview exposes only IDs, statuses, hashes, reason codes, and counters; tests assert forbidden raw strings are absent.
risks.risk: Raw payload or secret-like material is exposed in preview.
